The '''clawbird''' or '''''stana''''' (as natives called it) was a black-feathered avian from [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] that ate the flesh of dead animals and [[Alien/Legends|aliens]].

The clawbirds were among Wayland's [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Vongspawn|affected]] by the [[Vongspawn virus|sabotaged]] [[Ossus Project]]. One attempted to scavenge the unconscious body of [[Cade Skywalker]]. Upon waking, however, he [[Animal bond|tamed]] the creature and used it to find his friend [[Deliah Blue]], who had been abducted by the [[One Sith]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

{{Creature-stub}}
